characters.name: Alexander Kikin
characters.description: Alexander KikinAlexander Kikin is an ancestor of Sam and Samantha. He was a part of the Streltsy and owned the Kunstkamera in the Kikin palace before being executed by Peter the Great. Alexander is a tall, scruffy Russian man with light skin, black hair, beard, and mustache. He wears round glasses, a red and brown fur Cossack hat, a long red and brown coat, a blue kaftan with a gray cloth around the waist, beige pants, and red boots. Alex is a very valiant and nationalistic man who takes deep pride for his country. He's highly stubborn and old-fashioned, believing that Russia should stay in the old world, and refusing to go along with Peter's plans on making Russia more advanced believing that it would ruin Russia. Alex is a very valiant and nationalistic man who takes deep pride for his country. He's highly stubborn and old-fashioned, believing that Russia should stay in the old world, and refusing to go along with Peter's plans on making Russia more advanced believing that it would ruin Russia.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Tut, Tut""Plaid to the Bone"Voice ActorAnnick ObonsawinInformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAge4 (Books)5-9 (TV Series)Hair ColorBlackRelativesJoe Arthur(brother)Mrs. Arthur(mother)John Arthur(father)Joe the Magnificent(maternal uncle)Mad Jack(maternal uncle)Jodie(rreat-great niece)StatusAliveFriendFredSamEnemyMad JackFavorite ColorPinkAnna Arthuris the younger sister of Joe Arthur and a supporting character ofTime Warp Trio. Mrs. Arthur(mother)John Arthur(father)Joe the Magnificent(maternal uncle)Mad Jack(maternal uncle)Jodie(rreat-great niece) Sam She doesn't have many friends, because she does not enjoy karaoke or dolls very much. She seems to be unusually gifted withThe Book, even knowing about the transporter page (which Samantha uses inLewis and Clark...and Jodie, Freddi, and Samantha) , despite Joe continually saying that she doesn't know anything. She suspects that all of the women in her family are highly gifted with magic, but that they try hard not to show it. She is incredibly bright and learns much from observing the outside world. (To Joe, it's called "spying.") Anna's favorite ice cream flavor is rainbow sherbet, and if she were in a movie, she would be portrayed by Natalie Portman.

characters.name: Director Green
characters.description: Director Greenis Character in the Cartoon, and is the main antagonist of the 2005 episode "2105", Which is because she doesn't like kids and she tells herRobot Guardsto shred things in the shredder.

characters.name: Fred
characters.description: FredProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not So Jolly Roger""Harem Scare'em"Voice ActorScott McCordInformationNickname(s)Fred the FreakGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAge10EthnicityEnglish-AmericanEye ColorBlackHair ColorBlondeRelativesCarley Brown (mother)Mike(older brother)Freddi(great-granddaughter)StatusAliveDislikeBeing the youngestFriendJoe, Sam, Samantha, Jodie, Anna, BettyEnemyMike,Mad Jack Frederick "Fred"is one of the main characters ofTime Warp Trio. He is a ten year old sports fan, and a member ofthe present-day trio. Fred is the tallest of the main trio. He is a white male with short, blond curly hair and wears a blue baseball hat, blue jersey shirt with number 0 on the front, blue jeans, and black sneakers. Fred is fairly egotistical and rowdy; he’s often stubborn and can be quite hot-headed. He's also the most assertive and heroic out of the trio, usually putting himself out there more and running into dangerous situations to save his friends (and also due to his impulsive behavior). His impulsivity often results in getting the gang in trouble, and he always wants to persuade his two other friends,JoeandSam, to travel somewhere viaThe Bookwhere they can earn riches, glory, or credit for something in a time period where they did not do anything. Even though he leaps before he looks, Fred uses his eagerness as an advantage to defeat enemies and save the trio from trouble and/or death. He is also seen being protective of the people he cares about, on multiple occasions. This extends to the girls from the future, especially Freddi (who he worries for, and is proud of, inBirdman or Birdbrain? (Episode)). At the beginning of an episode when Joe orJodieare talking about how they got where they are, they mostly blame it on Fred. Fred does tend to have his cowardly and embarrassing moments. Despite his shrewdness and brash attitude, he's also shown to be compassionate, thoughtful and is always preparing to help others (usually in life-threatening situations) in any way he can, like helping the Professor not get executed in "See You Later, Gladiator". He has an older brother namedMike, who picks on him (occasionally due to him messing with Mike's stuff).

characters.name: Freddi
characters.description: FreddiProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"2105""The High and the Flighty"Voice ActorSunday MuseInformationNickname(s)BrainsuckerWeirdo GirlGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAge10EthnicityEnglish-AmericanHair ColorBlondeRelativesFred (great grandfather)Mike (great great uncle)StatusAliveDislikeWorms, Spiders, Moths, Going too fast, Samantha's Snoring, Samantha's StupidityFriendJodie, Sam, Samantha, JoeEnemyMad Jack Weirdo Girl Mike (great great uncle) Freddi is smart, timid, and idealistic. She is also a bit of a pushover, but can act rebellious and cynical if the moment calls for it. It is also revealed in "Lewis and Clark...and Jodie, Freddi, and Samantha" that she is abitof an anti-social person. She admits this when talking to Sacagawea about how sometimes she feels lonely even if she's around other people.

Tajja Isen (Starting with episode 20) Anna Arthur(Great Grandaunt)Mad Jack(Great Great Granduncle)Mrs. Arthur(Great Great Grandmother) She can be described as a bossy, aggressive, popular mean girl who has a passion for fashion and cheerleading. She is good friends with Sam and Joe, but often despises Fred. She is the owner of a locket which belonged to Joe's mother.

characters.name: Joe Arthur
characters.description: Joe ArthurProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not So Jolly Roger""Plaid to the Bone"Voice ActorMark RendallInformationNickname(s)Joe the MagnificentJoe the showGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAge10EthnicityMixed (African-American/Indian)Eye ColorBlackHair ColorBlackStatusAliveEnemyMad JackFavorite FoodPizzaJoseph "Joe" Arthuris a member ofThe Time Warp Trioand the current owner ofThe Book. He is the main protagonist, and one of the six main characters in the series. He is voiced by Mark Rendall. Joe the show Joe has dark skin, freckles, and spiky black hair. He wears a green t-shirt, blue jeans, and sneakers. Joe is an average kid living in Brooklyn. He likes pizza, and the Yankees. He wants to be a magician when he grows up, just like hisUncle Joe, and he trains to be one. He is the current owner ofThe Book, after inheriting it from Uncle Joe. The latter passed it on as a gift, when Joe turned ten at the beginning of the series. Joe constantly argues with his younger sister,Anna, and has been known to have infrequent arguments with his best friends,SamandFred. His favorite ice cream flavor is vanilla, and if he was in a movie, he'd like John Cusack, Will Smith, or Leonardo di Caprio to play him. Joe is usually neat, level-headed, and moderate, but he can be foolish and immature. He has a witty attitude and slightly eccentric interests. He's also a keen thinker, as shown in "Break An Egg", where he tricked Mad Jack into thinking the latter finally had the book, rather than Joe's diary wrapped in The Book's cover over it.

characters.name: Joe the Magnificent
characters.description: Joe the MagnificentProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not-So-Jolly Roger (Episode)""Plaid to the Bone (Episode)"InformationGenderMale ♂PronounHe/HimSpeciesHumanAgeAdultJoe the Magnificentis Joe's maternal uncle who is a magician, but not so great. He gave his nephew The Book (which he couldn't use that well either). Seconds after Joe received The Book, his uncle vanished. He has other means of travelling through time, though seems to suffer from the same lack of control over these methods as he did over The Book. Joe is a formally dressed scrawny man with tan skin, a large pink and dark purple top hat, black spiky hair, a large French mustache, and black and white tuxedo shoes. Uncle Joe is probably the most optimistic character in the series. Being eccentric, chipper, and whimsical all around. Joe is very sophisticated and humble towards others too. He's somewhat of an amateur at what he does but still manages to get by in the end using his abilities when he's in sticky situations. He also has a naive/child-like sense to him as well from believing in things like tooth fairy and easter bunny. Uncle Joe is probably the most optimistic character in the series. Being eccentric, chipper, and whimsical all around. Joe is very sophisticated and humble towards others too. characters.name: Mad Jack
characters.description: Mad JackProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not-So-Jolly Roger""Plaid to the Bone"InformationGenderMale ♂Mad Jack is the main antagonist and the main villain of the TV series. He wantsThe Bookto rule the Space Time Continuum. Mad Jack is Joe's other maternal uncle and the brother of Uncle Joe and Joe and Anna's mother. He believes the book is rightfully his and will do anything to get it so he can rule all of eternity. He can be seen in the background of every single episode. He only appears in the TV show. He no doubt has an estranged relationship with his family as Joe and Anna never knew about him before he introduced himself. Mad Jack is a lanky, formally dressed man that wears a monocle on his right eye, has a long spiky black mustache and hair that point on each side of his head, wears a long black cape, has a spiky short beard on his chin, and black shoes. Just like his brother, Mad Jack is eccentric, silly, and a bit childish. However, that's really all they have in common personality wise, as the other side of him is cruel, gluttonous, and malevolent due to his willingness to harm and kill anyone (including his own family) just to get his way. Examples include him planning on disintegrating Joe and the others inWushu Were Hereand attempting to drown Sam, Jodie, and Fred inHarem Scare'em. He was temporarily defeated whenLady Agnushit him with a frying panPlaid to the Bone, but ran away in the end.

However, that's really all they have in common personality wise, as the other side of him is cruel, gluttonous, and malevolent due to his willingness to harm and kill anyone (including his own family) just to get his way. Examples include him planning on disintegrating Joe and the others inWushu Were Hereand attempting to drown Sam, Jodie, and Fred inHarem Scare'em. He was temporarily defeated whenLady Agnushit him with a frying panPlaid to the Bone, but ran away in the end.

characters.name: Mad Jack
characters.description: Mad JackProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not-So-Jolly Roger""Plaid to the Bone"InformationGenderMale ♂Mad Jack is the main antagonist and the main villain of the TV series. He wantsThe Bookto rule the Space Time Continuum. Mad Jack is Joe's other maternal uncle and the brother of Uncle Joe and Joe and Anna's mother. He believes the book is rightfully his and will do anything to get it so he can rule all of eternity. He can be seen in the background of every single episode. He only appears in the TV show. He no doubt has an estranged relationship with his family as Joe and Anna never knew about him before he introduced himself. Mad Jack is a lanky, formally dressed man that wears a monocle on his right eye, has a long spiky black mustache and hair that point on each side of his head, wears a long black cape, has a spiky short beard on his chin, and black shoes. Just like his brother, Mad Jack is eccentric, silly, and a bit childish. However, that's really all they have in common personality wise, as the other side of him is cruel, gluttonous, and malevolent due to his willingness to harm and kill anyone (including his own family) just to get his way. Examples include him planning on disintegrating Joe and the others inWushu Were Hereand attempting to drown Sam, Jodie, and Fred inHarem Scare'em. He was temporarily defeated whenLady Agnushit him with a frying panPlaid to the Bone, but ran away in the end.

characters.name: Mike
characters.description: MikeInformationGenderMale ♂Age16RelativesFred (brother)Freddi (great great niece)EnemyFred, Sam, JoeMichael "Mike"is Fred's older brother and the minor antagonist inTime Warp Trio. Freddi (great great niece) Mike is a large white male with strawberry blonde hair, a red baseball hat turned backwards, a gray sleeveless hoodie, light blue jeans and red sneakers. Mike is shown to be controlling, short-temperd, and quite belligerent. He takes enjoyment bullying Fred and making him feel inferior to him. But just like Fred, his anger can wound up giving him the short end of the stick as seen inViking It and Liking It, when he tried to chase them through the fire escape but wounded up get stuck in the window and resulted in him getting mocked by the trio.

characters.name: Mrs. Arthur
characters.description: Mrs. ArthurProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"The Not-So-Jolly Roger""Break an Egg"InformationGenderFemale ♀Mrs. Arthuris the mother of Joe and Anna. She is also the sister of Uncle Joe and Mad Jack. In the book series she is portrayed as a short tempered woman who was once the owner of the book herself. In the TV series however she is not portrayed as someone who is involved with the book. No doubt though she is very much aware of what it's true powers are. characters.name: Sam
characters.description: SamVoice ActorDarren FrostInformationNickname(s)Sam the ManGenderMale ♂Age10EthnicityRussian AmericanHair ColorBlackStatusAliveEnemyMad Jack Samuel "Sam"is a 10 year old boy living in Brooklyn. He is a main character in the series. He is a member ofthe present-day trio. In the books, he wears a maroon polo shirt, navy blue jeans and sneakers. He is the most intelligent of the present-day group.  He often uses book smarts, calculations, and research to get himself and the gang out of trouble. Even though his ideas and his extensive knowledge of history help him to solve multiple problems, Sam is quite self-conscious. He worries that his intelligence makes him a bit of a nerd. Sam is also very cautious of time travel, and he's convinced their doom is imminent every time they open The Book. He is the most nervous and fearful of the present-day group, being afraid of things that the other characters find unconcerning. He is a lot like Freddi in this regard. He and Fred don’t tend to get along well due to there clashing personalities, but they’re still quite close as friends.

characters.name: Samantha
characters.description: Samantha KikinProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"2105""The High and the Flighty"Voice ActorLaurie ElliottInformationNickname(s)BrainsuckerWeirdo GirlGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAge1011 (in My Big Fat Greek Olympics)EthnicityRussian-AmericanHair ColorBlackRelativesSam(paternal great-grandfather)StatusAliveFriendJodieFreddiEnemyMad JackSamanthais a 10-11 year old girl from 100 years in the future. She isSam's great-granddaughter, and is somewhat similar toFred, though like her great-grandfather, she can sometimes be sensitive. She is adventurous. She is one member of the future trio, alongside her friendsJodieandFreddi. Weirdo Girl 11 (in My Big Fat Greek Olympics) Samantha is a quick-witted, daring, and outgoing girl. She's a bit silly, insensible, and not always organized. She is very reassuring when her friends are stressed or afraid. This can be seen when she is trying to calm Freddi down in the cave in "Birdman or Birdbrain?" and when she tried to cheer Jodie up in "Lewis and Clark... and Jodie, Freddi, and Samantha".

characters.name: Sarah Gadon
characters.description: Sarah Gadon was Jodie's first voice actress, she portrayed her in2105,Sam Samurai,Lewis and Clark...and Jodie, Freddi, and Samantha,Hey Kid, Want to Buy a Bridge?,The Seven Blunders of the WorldandJinga All the Way.

characters.name: The Time Warp Trio
characters.description: The Present-Day Trio:Joe,Fred,  AndSam. TheTime Warp Triois a heroic and mischievous team that has to be a great representative of the time and space. A group of three powerful children try to discover past places in which they face duel with gladiators in ancient Rome, march in battle with the samurai in Shogunate Japan, meet Blackbeard the pirate on the high seas, or ride a horse in battle against the Tartars with a young Genghis Khan.
